title: Go Pack Missing YAML Frontmatter (Contract 2 Violation)
description: The Go anti-patterns pack is the only pack file without YAML frontmatter. All 5 new packs have proper meta blocks with stack, version, and last_reviewed. This violates Contract 2 (AC-00-2.1, AC-00-2.5).

title: Rust Pack BAD Example Contains Non-Compiling Code
description: In 'Ignoring Clippy Warnings Without Justification', the BAD example calls result.unwrap() on a String value. String has no unwrap() method — this would not compile. Fabricated non-compiling code undermines the pack's credibility.

title: Go Pack Entry Count Below Spec Minimum
description: Go pack has 10 entries but spec requires >=15. Of the 10, 8 are near-verbatim copies of universal rules from code-quality.md, leaving only 2 Go-specific entries.

title: Go Pack Duplicates 8 Universal Rules from code-quality.md
description: First 8 entries are Go-specific implementations of the same 8 universal rules in code-quality.md. Agents reading both files get duplicate guidance. The 5 new packs correctly avoid this duplication.

title: TypeScript Pack Contains React-Specific Entry
description: Entry 'Avoid Unnecessary Re-renders from Object Literals in Props' at line 355 references React.memo, useMemo, JSX props — React-specific content. The React pack already covers this at line 84. Spec AC-C02-1.6 says React entries belong in the React pack.

title: Missing codex-review and context-docs References in work-harness.md Hub
description: Two new sub-skills (codex-review.md, context-docs.md) are not listed in the parent skill's References section. Agents reading work-harness.md will not discover these skills.

title: Stale Sync Point Count in workflow-meta.md
description: Sync Points section says 'currently 11 work commands + /delegate' but current inventory is 16 table entries. Stale count will mislead future self-modification sessions.

title: ama.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
description: AMA command received 49 lines of new content including answer strategies and depth calibration. Per skill-lifecycle.md, material changes require version bump. Version remains at 1.

title: codex-review.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
description: Received 45 lines of new content including diff preparation, multi-file handling, size limits. Version remains at 1.

title: context-docs.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
description: Received 90 lines of new content including config examples, edge cases, agent doc impact flagging. Version remains at 1.

title: harness-doctor.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
description: Added Check 8 (Agency-Agents Recommendations), bumped check count from 7 to 8. Behavioral change — version remains at 1.

title: work-harness.md Hub Version Not Bumped After Adding References
description: Three new reference entries added (skill-lifecycle, dev-update, agency-curation). Agents now discover 3 new sub-skills. Version remains at 1.

title: Rust GOOD Example Allocation Subtlety in Hot Loops Entry
description: GOOD example pre-allocates buffer but still calls buffer.clone() per iteration. The benefit (retained buffer capacity) is real but subtle. Adding a comment would clarify.

title: Python String Concatenation Severity Could Be info
description: 'String Concatenation in Loop' marked as warn but CPython 3.x has in-place optimization. More of a style improvement than production risk.

title: React Error Boundaries GOOD Example Uses Class Component
description: Error boundaries require class components (correct), but AI agents may struggle with class syntax. Suggesting react-error-boundary library as alternative would help.

title: pr-prep NO_DESC Detection Conflates Labels with Description
description: State 6 triggers when body is empty/short OR labels are empty. A PR with thorough description but no labels would be detected as NO_DESC incorrectly.

title: pr-prep STALE_DESC Heuristic May Produce False Positives
description: Staleness check compares file count in description vs diff. Valid descriptions that summarize at feature level without listing files would always trigger.

title: harness-doctor Check 8 Missing Degradation Note
description: Check 8 depends on check 1 but the degradation rule on line 195 only mentions checks 2 and 5. Should say 'Skip checks 2, 5, and 8'.

title: pr-prep CLOSED State Stops Without Offering Options
description: CLOSED state reports closure and stops but doesn't suggest creating a new PR with --create-only.

title: codex-review Exec Command Syntax Ambiguous
description: The codex exec invocation uses '< <diff-input>' placeholder which could be read as variable syntax or redirect. Should show concrete piped form.

title: work-dump Step 4 Broken Markdown Fencing
description: Nested code fence inside outer code fence causes garbled rendering. Inner triple backticks close outer fence prematurely.

title: pr-prep State 7 Calls gh pr view Redundantly
description: STALE_DESC runs gh pr view to get baseRefName, but initial state detection already fetched this. Should reuse cached result.

title: docs/feature/skills-pipeline.md Shows Stale Status
description: Feature summary says 'Status: Spec' but implementation is complete and task is in review step.

title: Go Pack Missing YAML Frontmatter (Contract 2 Violation)
resolution: Added YAML frontmatter with meta block: stack=["go"], version=2, last_reviewed=2026-03-25

title: Rust Pack BAD Example Contains Non-Compiling Code
resolution: Changed BAD example to use Result<String, serde_json::Error> type with serde_json::from_str — unwrap is now valid. GOOD example also updated to use proper error handling.

title: Go Pack Entry Count Below Spec Minimum
resolution: Added 7 Go-specific entries (goroutine leak, nil interface, context propagation, defer in loop, slice append aliasing, init() abuse, variable shadowing). Total now 17 entries, exceeds 15 minimum.

title: Go Pack Duplicates 8 Universal Rules from code-quality.md
resolution: Intentional — user confirmed duplicates provide valuable Go-specific grounding of abstract rules. Each entry has concrete Go examples (_, _ = syntax, if err == nil patterns, NewXxxService convention) that reinforce universal rules in language-specific context. Kept as-is by design.

title: TypeScript Pack Contains React-Specific Entry
resolution: Removed React-specific 'Object Literals in Props' entry (covered in react-anti-patterns.md). Replaced with TypeScript-specific 'Avoid enum at Runtime' entry about union types vs runtime enum objects.

title: Missing codex-review and context-docs References in work-harness.md Hub
resolution: Added codex-review and context-docs reference entries to work-harness.md References section.

title: Stale Sync Point Count in workflow-meta.md
resolution: Updated sync point count from '11 work commands + /delegate' to '16 table entries'.

title: ama.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
resolution: Bumped version to 2, updated last_reviewed to 2026-03-25.

title: codex-review.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
resolution: Bumped version to 2, updated last_reviewed to 2026-03-25.

title: context-docs.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
resolution: Bumped version to 2, updated last_reviewed to 2026-03-25.

title: harness-doctor.md Version Not Bumped After Material Changes
resolution: Bumped version to 2, updated last_reviewed to 2026-03-25.

title: work-harness.md Hub Version Not Bumped After Adding References
resolution: Bumped version to 2, updated last_reviewed to 2026-03-25. Also added 2 missing references (codex-review, context-docs).

title: Rust GOOD Example Allocation Subtlety in Hot Loops Entry
resolution: Added clarifying comment to clone() call: 'clone allocates for output, but buffer retains capacity — avoids repeated growth'

title: Python String Concatenation Severity Could Be info
resolution: Lowered severity from warn to info. Also recategorized from Anti-pattern to Performance.

title: React Error Boundaries GOOD Example Uses Class Component
resolution: Added note before class component: 'Error boundaries currently require class components. Libraries like react-error-boundary provide a function-component-friendly wrapper.'

title: pr-prep NO_DESC Detection Conflates Labels with Description
resolution: Separated label check from body check. NO_DESC now triggers only on empty/short body. Empty labels noted as advisory in action output.

title: pr-prep STALE_DESC Heuristic May Produce False Positives
resolution: Changed heuristic from file-count comparison to timestamp-based: compares updatedAt from initial query against latest commit timestamp.

title: harness-doctor Check 8 Missing Degradation Note
resolution: Added check 8 to degradation rule and edge cases table alongside checks 2 and 5.

title: pr-prep CLOSED State Stops Without Offering Options
resolution: Added --create-only suggestion to CLOSED state action message.

title: codex-review Exec Command Syntax Ambiguous
resolution: Replaced ambiguous '< <diff-input>' with concrete piped form showing git diff | codex exec pattern.

title: work-dump Step 4 Broken Markdown Fencing
resolution: Changed outer code fence from triple backticks to ~~~ to avoid conflict with inner triple backtick code blocks.

title: pr-prep State 7 Calls gh pr view Redundantly
resolution: Changed STALE_DESC to reuse baseRefName from Step 8 initial query instead of making redundant gh pr view call.

title: docs/feature/skills-pipeline.md Shows Stale Status
resolution: Updated status from 'Spec' to 'Review'.
